items.title: One pattern I find useful for working with LLMs is a nice long ramble session.

items.description: One pattern I find useful for working with LLMs is a nice long ramble session. Sometimes the LLM needs more bits to understand what you're trying to achieve, but you're too lazy to type them. In these cases I like to lean back, switch to /…

items.title: Today’s launches are all about better performance, lower latency, and a smaller bill.

items.title: The more I’ve relied on my second brain, the dumber my main brain has become.
items.title_zh: 我越依赖我的第二大脑，我的主脑就变得越笨。
items.description: The more I’ve relied on my second brain, the dumber my main brain has become. I’m realizing there’s tremendous value in carrying around a lot of facts, half-baked ideas, and loose threads in your head. Your subconscious keeps cooking. It m…
items.description_zh: 我越依赖我的第二大脑，我的主脑就变得越笨。我意识到，保留大量事实、不成熟的想法和头脑中的松散线索具有巨大的价值。你的潜意识一直在做饭。它是…
